voda.title: Water Treatment & Purification — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
voda.intro.label: About the Service
voda.intro.p1: The water treatment division combines the development of process solutions, design and equipment supply for industrial and municipal facilities. We have our own production of filter materials based on zirconium hydroxide and phosphate.
voda.intro.p2: The synergy of our own Termoxid sorbents with design competencies allows offering unique technological solutions unavailable to competitors — primarily for radioactive and heavy metal purification tasks.
voda.intro.li2: Design of treatment facilities of any capacity
voda.intro.li4: Supply of reagents and auxiliary equipment
voda.tech.intro: The company has competencies in a wide range of water treatment technologies, allowing the selection of the optimal solution for each specific task.
voda.tech.li1: Ion exchange — on inorganic (Termoxid) and organic sorbents
voda.tech.li2: Reverse osmosis and ultrafiltration — membrane purification methods
voda.tech.li3: Coagulation and flocculation — removal of suspended solids
voda.tech.li4: Activated carbon sorption — removal of organic contaminants
voda.tech.li6: Chemical precipitation — removal of heavy metals and phosphates
voda.services.label: Services
voda.services.title: Full Range of Services
voda.svc1.title: Pre-Design Survey
voda.svc1.desc: Chemical analysis of source water, survey of existing water treatment systems, detailed technical report preparation with recommendations.
voda.svc2.title: Investment Justification
voda.svc2.desc: Development of investment justification for construction or reconstruction of water supply and drainage facilities, lifecycle cost assessment.
voda.svc3.title: Process Flow Diagrams
voda.svc3.desc: Development of basic process flow diagrams for water treatment and treatment plants considering water composition specifics and purification quality requirements.
voda.svc4.title: Water Consumption Balances
voda.svc4.desc: Development of water consumption and discharge balance diagrams for industrial enterprises, including water reduction programs.
voda.svc5.title: Filter Materials
voda.svc5.desc: Production and supply of Termoxid series filter materials and other sorbents for water treatment systems, industrial and wastewater purification.
voda.svc6.title: Turnkey Water Treatment Systems
voda.svc6.desc: Selection, supply and commissioning of comprehensive water treatment systems and treatment plants, including automation and dispatch systems.
voda.tech.label: Technologies
voda.tech.title: Applied Purification Technologies
voda.obj.label: Application Objects
voda.obj.title: Facilities We Work For
voda.obj1.title: Nuclear Power Plants
voda.obj1.desc: Special water purification systems for 1st, 2nd and 3rd circuits, LRW management, special laundry and decontamination solutions.
voda.obj2.title: Industrial Enterprises
voda.obj2.desc: Recirculating water supply, galvanic wastewater treatment, acid-alkali wastewater, cooling systems.
voda.obj3.title: Thermal Power Plants
voda.obj3.desc: Boiler and district heating make-up water, condensate polishing, water treatment systems for boiler-turbine shops.
voda.obj4.title: Mining Industry
voda.obj4.desc: Mine and quarry water purification, valuable component extraction from process solutions, acid drainage neutralization.
voda.cta.title: Need a Water Treatment System?
voda.cta.desc: Send us a water analysis — our technologists will select the optimal solution and calculate the cost.
